[textmode.figlet.js](../index.md) / TextmodifierFigletExtensions

# Interface: TextmodifierFigletExtensions

FIGlet methods added to the `textmode.js` `Textmodifier` API when
[FigletPlugin](../variables/FigletPlugin.md) is installed.

## Methods

### loadFigFont()

```ts
loadFigFont(source): Promise<TextmodeFigFont>;
```

Load a FIGlet font from a `.flf` file URL or path.

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `source` | `string` \| `URL` | The `.flf` file source. |

#### Returns

`Promise`\<[`TextmodeFigFont`](../classes/TextmodeFigFont.md)\>

A parsed FIGlet font instance.

#### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="-_Lm5hbWUgPz8gJ25vbmUnfWAsIDEwLCBbMTYwLCAxODAsIDIyMF0pOwp9KTsKCnQud2luZG93UmVzaXplZCgoKSA9PiB7Cgl0LnJlc2l6ZUNhbnZhcyh3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJXaWR0aCwgd2luZG93LmlubmVySGVpZ2h0KTsKfSk7" />

***

### parseFigFont()

```ts
parseFigFont(name, data): TextmodeFigFont;
```

Parse a FIGlet font from raw `.flf` contents.

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `name` | `string` | Human-readable font name. |
| `data` | `string` | Raw `.flf` file contents. |

#### Returns

[`TextmodeFigFont`](../classes/TextmodeFigFont.md)

A parsed FIGlet font instance.

#### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="-" />

***

### figFont()

#### Call Signature

```ts
figFont(): TextmodeFigFont | undefined;
```

Get the active FIGlet font used by `figText()`.

##### Returns

[`TextmodeFigFont`](../classes/TextmodeFigFont.md) \| `undefined`

The currently active FIGlet font, if any.

##### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="_IGJ1bGJoZWFkIDogY29sb3NzYWw7Cgljb25zdCBzYW1wbGUgPSB1c2VCdWxiaGVhZCA_ICdCVUxCJyA6ICdCSUcnOwoKCXQuZmlnRm9udChhY3RpdmVGb250KTsKCgl3cml0ZUxhYmVsKCdUZXh0bW9kaWZpZXIuZmlnRm9udCcsIC0xMiwgWzI1NSwgMjE0LCAxMDJdKTsKCXQuY2hhckNvbG9yKDEyNCwgMjE0LCAyNTUpOwoJdC5maWdUZXh0KHNhbXBsZSwgMCwgLTIsIHsKCQlob3Jpem9udGFsTGF5b3V0OiAnZml0dGVkJywKCX0pOwoJd3JpdGVMYWJlbChgc2V0dGVyIC0-ICR7YWN0aXZlRm9udC5uYW1lfWAsIDksIFsyMjAsIDIzMCwgMjU1XSk7Cgl3cml0ZUxhYmVsKGBnZXR0ZXIgLT4gJHt0LmZpZ0ZvbnQoKT8ubmFtZSA_PyAnbm9uZSd9YCwgMTIsIFsxNjAsIDE4MCwgMjIwXSk7Cn0pOwoKdC53aW5kb3dSZXNpemVkKCgpID0-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />

#### Call Signature

```ts
figFont(font): void;
```

Set the active FIGlet font used by `figText()`.

##### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `font` | [`TextmodeFigFont`](../classes/TextmodeFigFont.md) | The FIGlet font to use for subsequent text rendering. |

##### Returns

`void`

***

### figText()

```ts
figText(
   text, 
   col, 
   row, 
   options?): void;
```

Render a FIGlet string onto the current textmode grid using the active FIGlet font.

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `text` | `string` | The text to render. |
| `col` | `number` | Target column in grid space. |
| `row` | `number` | Target row in grid space. |
| `options?` | [`FigTextOptions`](FigTextOptions.md) | Optional layout overrides. |

#### Returns

`void`

#### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="-IE1hdGgucm91bmQoc3RhcnQgKyAodG9baW5kZXhdIC0gc3RhcnQpICogd2F2ZSkpOwp9Cgp0LnNldHVwKGFzeW5jICgpID0--IChjZWxsLnN1YkNvbCA9PT0gMCA_IFsyNCwgMjgsIDUyLCAyNTVdIDogdW5kZWZpbmVkKSwKCX0pOwoJd3JpdGVMYWJlbCgncGVyLWNlbGwgY29sb3IgY2FsbGJhY2tzIGNhbiBzdHlsZSB0aGUgcmVuZGVyZWQgZ2x5cGggcGxhbicsIDEwLCBbMjIwLCAyMzAsIDI1NV0pOwp9KTsKCnQud2luZG93UmVzaXplZCgoKSA9PiB7Cgl0LnJlc2l6ZUNhbnZhcyh3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJXaWR0aCwgd2luZG93LmlubmVySGVpZ2h0KTsKfSk7" />

***

### figTextWidth()

```ts
figTextWidth(text, options?): number;
```

Measure the rendered width of a FIGlet string in grid cells.

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `text` | `string` | The text to measure. |
| `options?` | [`FigTextOptions`](FigTextOptions.md) | Optional layout overrides. |

#### Returns

`number`

Width in grid cells.

#### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="-" />

***

### figTextHeight()

```ts
figTextHeight(text, options?): number;
```

Measure the rendered height of a FIGlet string in grid cells.

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `text` | `string` | The text to measure. |
| `options?` | [`FigTextOptions`](FigTextOptions.md) | Optional layout overrides. |

#### Returns

`number`

Height in grid cells.

#### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="--IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />

***

### figTextBounds()

```ts
figTextBounds(text, options?): object;
```

Measure the rendered bounds of a FIGlet string in grid cells.

#### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `text` | `string` | The text to measure. |
| `options?` | [`FigTextOptions`](FigTextOptions.md) | Optional layout overrides. |

#### Returns

`object`

Width and height in grid cells.

| Name | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `cols` | `number` |
| `rows` | `number` |

#### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="" />

***

### figTextAlign()

#### Call Signature

```ts
figTextAlign(): FigTextAlign;
```

Get the current horizontal FIGlet text alignment.

##### Returns

[`FigTextAlign`](../type-aliases/FigTextAlign.md)

The current alignment mode.

##### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />

#### Call Signature

```ts
figTextAlign(align): void;
```

Set the horizontal FIGlet text alignment.

##### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `align` | [`FigTextAlign`](../type-aliases/FigTextAlign.md) | Alignment mode for subsequent `figText()` calls. |

##### Returns

`void`

***

### figTextBaseline()

#### Call Signature

```ts
figTextBaseline(): FigTextBaseline;
```

Get the current vertical FIGlet text baseline mode.

##### Returns

[`FigTextBaseline`](../type-aliases/FigTextBaseline.md)

The current baseline mode.

##### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="TextmodifierFigletExtensions" encoded-code="--IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />

#### Call Signature

```ts
figTextBaseline(baseline): void;
```

Set the vertical FIGlet text baseline mode.

##### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `baseline` | [`FigTextBaseline`](../type-aliases/FigTextBaseline.md) | Baseline mode for subsequent `figText()` calls. |

##### Returns

`void`
